note: Frozen PROFESSOR-APPS posting corpus (real faculty hiring units, collected 2026-05-31). The agent fetches this file and classifies every posting by id against the candidate CV. Fit verdicts are NOT included here. Read each description: department titles are deliberately not a reliable shortcut.

postings.description: The Department of Mathematics seeks a faculty member in mathematics education and undergraduate teaching.
The MSIS department seeks a faculty member in management information systems whose teaching and research center on enterprise systems, IT governance, and digital business processes.
The Computer Science department seeks a faculty member in applied deep learning and AI systems, building scalable models and software systems and teaching in the CS program.

postings.department: SC Johnson College of Business (Operations, Technology and Information Management)
postings.description: The OTIM area seeks a faculty member in operations management and business analytics whose research is in operations, optimization, and managerial decision-making.
The marketing faculty seeks a member teaching marketing analytics and AI applications in marketing.

The role leads the cancer center's biostatistics shared resource, providing study-design and analysis support to cancer investigators across the center's grants and supervising the resource's analysts.
The GSB Marketing area seeks a faculty member in quantitative marketing studying consumer behavior and marketing strategy.

postings.department: Department of Quantitative Theory and Methods
postings.description: The Department of Quantitative Theory and Methods seeks a tenure-track methodologist developing causal-inference and measurement methods, with an independent research program and teaching in the QTM programs.

postings.research_area: AI in digital pathology; medical imaging
postings.description: The department seeks a faculty member developing AI for digital pathology and medical image analysis; the core is the pathology / imaging domain.
The Department of Statistics and Data Sciences seeks a tenure-track methodologist in scientific machine learning and statistical foundations of AI.
The Department of Biostatistics seeks a tenure-track assistant professor developing statistical methodology for health and biomedical data science.
The Department of Mathematics and Statistics seeks a tenure-track statistician whose methodological research spans statistics, biostatistics, or data science.

The School of Information Studies seeks an informatics faculty member working on information science, human-information interaction, and sociotechnical data use, with teaching in the informatics programs.

The Wharton Department of Statistics and Data Science seeks a tenure-track assistant professor to develop research in statistical methodology and the foundations of data science and to teach in its PhD and undergraduate programs.

postings.department: Department of Mathematics, Statistics, and Computer Science
postings.description: The department is making a tenure-track STATISTICS hire to develop a research program in statistical methodology and mentor undergraduate research.
The combined Department of Computer Science and Statistics is making its statistics hire: a tenure-track statistician with a data-science focus to develop methodological research.

postings.institution: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
postings.description: The Gillings Department of Biostatistics seeks open-rank tenure-track faculty developing new statistical methodology for biomedical and public-health research.

postings.department: Department of Industrial Engineering and Operations Research (IEOR)
postings.description: IEOR seeks a tenure-track methodologist to build an independent research program in machine-learning theory and data-driven decision-making and publish in statistics and machine-learning venues.

postings.department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
postings.description: The CSE department seeks faculty in its AI cluster working on core computer-science AI; a computer-science line.
A tenure-track MATHEMATICS-EDUCATION line in the combined department; the research program is in the teaching and learning of mathematics.

postings.research_area: methodological core of data science; statistical ML
postings.description: HDSI seeks ladder-rank faculty developing the methodological core of data science, including statistical machine learning and the theory of data-driven inference.
The Department of Mathematics and Statistics is making a tenure-track STATISTICS hire to develop modern statistical methodology.
This appointment directs the department's statistical consulting service, supervising consulting engagements for campus researchers and teaching applied short-courses.

postings.department: H. Milton Stewart School of Industrial and Systems Engineering (ISyE)
postings.description: ISyE seeks a tenure-track faculty member to lead an independent research program in high-dimensional inference and learning theory; the appointment is one of the school's statistics-group hires.

postings.institution: University of North Carolina at Charlotte
postings.description: A teaching-track appointment directing and teaching the professional master's in data science; the role is instruction and program administration, not tenure-track research.
The Department of Biostatistics seeks a tenure-track assistant professor advancing statistical methodology for health research.

postings.research_area: methods for biomedical and health research
postings.description: The Department of Quantitative Health Sciences seeks a tenure-track methodologist who will develop new analytic methods for biomedical and health research and lead an independent, grant-funded program.

postings.department: Department of Data Science and Business Analytics

postings.department: Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering

The Department of Information Systems seeks faculty whose work centers on IS theory and enterprise data use.

postings.description: The department seeks a tenure-track methodologist who will develop new statistical methods for population and health data and build an independent research program.
